fn build_csv_row(fields: &[&str]) -> String {
    let total_len: usize = fields.iter().map(|f| f.len()).sum::<usize>() + fields.len().saturating_sub(1);
    let mut row = String::with_capacity(total_len);
    for (i, field) in fields.iter().enumerate() {
        if i > 0 {
            row.push(',');
        }
        row.push_str(field);
    }
    row
}

fn format_query_params(pairs: &[(&str, &str)]) -> String {
    let total_len: usize = pairs.iter().map(|(k, v)| k.len() + v.len() + 2).sum::<usize>();
    let mut query = String::with_capacity(total_len);
    for (i, (key, value)) in pairs.iter().enumerate() {
        if i > 0 {
            query.push('&');
        }
        query.push_str(key);
        query.push('=');
        query.push_str(value);
    }
    query
}

fn build_log_line(parts: &[String]) -> String {
    let total_len: usize = parts.iter().map(|p| p.len() + 3).sum::<usize>();
    let mut line = String::with_capacity(total_len);
    for part in parts {
        line.push_str("[");
        line.push_str(part);
        line.push_str("] ");
    }
    line
}

fn repeat_char(ch: char, count: usize) -> String {
    let mut s = String::with_capacity(count * ch.len_utf8());
    for _ in 0..count {
        s.push(ch);
    }
    s
}
